title: Trianii (language)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Trianii''' was the native language of the [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] species from [[Trian/Legends|Trian]].

Trianii language was formed of purrs and growls, rolling its vocalizations. Instead of an alphabet, Trianii used a syllabary.<ref name="Galaxy at War">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>

Most Trianii were fluent in both Trianii language and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.

{{Language-stub}}
